# Ultrasound Product Card Template

## Purpose

Defines the ideal CyberMedica card for ultrasound systems.

## Required Sections

- Identity: manufacturer, model, variant, registration number, status, country.
- Classification: ultrasound type, clinical specialties, care setting.
- Documents: RU, user manual/IFU, datasheet, probe list, software/options.
- Imaging modes: B, M, Doppler, elastography or other documented modes.
- Display and controls: screen, touch, console/cart/portable format.
- Probes: compatible transducers, connectors, applications.
- Software: packages, measurement tools, options.
- Connectivity: DICOM, export, network, ports.
- Electrical/physical: power, dimensions, weight.
- Maintenance/service: cleaning, calibration, service notes.
- Procurement notes: probes/options to request explicitly.
- Evidence: source documents and locators.

## Critical Fields

- probe compatibility;
- imaging modes;
- clinical applications;
- software/options;
- DICOM/connectivity;
- power and physical format.

## Safety

Never infer probe compatibility from product family. Brochure-only clinical
application claims require review before publication.
